parameters: \n<Harbin>(It's a pile of wood, but where did the wood come from?)
Are you some kind of angel?
\nr<???> You're on the Isle of Eaglet.
\nr<???> This is a small village by the coast.
It doesn't have a name yet.
that's ages away from where I came from.
\nr<???> I found you drowning in the ocean a few
minutes ago, you're lucky to be alive.
\nr<???> Where the hell did you come from, anyway?
\nr<Lisnia>I was in Caesite just a minute ago.
\nr<???> How d'you manage to cross the freaking ocean?
I was with my friends then...\.BAM!
\nr<???> I'll take you to the inn to rest,
\nr<Lisnia>I don't even know who you are.
\nr<???> Are you asking for my name?
\nr<Harbin> Don't you dare push me around!
\n<Harbin>(I need to take her to the inn first.)
\n<Harbin>(I need to take her to the inn first.)
\nr<Aneca>They appear to have used the teleport stone,
\nr<Aneca>You’re just as much of a fool.
But we have to find out what’s going on.
\nr<Aneca>And we have to find my father.
\nr<\n[1]>I don’t really care about that part.
\nr<Haiden>I don’t really care about that part.
